_comment: Source of truth for the tool surface the server exposes with DFHACK_MCP_DEV unset. T0 (scripts/verify.mjs --tier=0) diffs tools/list against this and fails on any drift. Adding or renaming a tool is a DELIBERATE, reviewable edit here — that's the point. run_lua is intentionally absent: it only registers under DFHACK_MCP_DEV. Keep names sorted.
